steps.t: King Thorin can be found at Vosh Torú. You have come with King Thorin on an errand to Vosh Torú. You should talk to King Thorin.
Hersegg can be found at Vosh Torú. After arriving at Vosh Torú, you have learned that Hersegg's errand involves her grandather, Hermáth. You should ta…
Hermáth Stormhammer can be found at Vosh Torú. You have met Hermáth Stormhammer and he seems eager to meet you in turn. You should hail Hermáth Stormh…
King Thorin can be found at Vosh Torú. After introducing yourself, King Thorin has gestured for you to come speak with him. You should talk to King Th…
King Thorin can be found at Vosh Torú. After speaking with Hermáth Stormhammer, King Thorin seems relieved. You should talk to King Thorin.
